name: scaledown
description: Official ScaleDown plugins for Claude Code. Reduce AI API costs by up to 95% using task-specific SLMs for classification, extraction, summarization, and context compression.

plugins.name: slm-agent
plugins.description: Scans your codebase for AI API calls and generates a migration plan showing exactly where and how to replace expensive LLM calls with task-specific SLMs — up to 95% cheaper. No data from your codebase is ever sent to ScaleDown servers.
